title: Reliability-Aware PM2.5 Mapping in Africa via Satellite-Reanalysis Fusion and Sparse Monitors
authors: Yaw Osei Adjei, Davis Opoku, Ephraim Abotsi, Benjamin Tei Partey

title: Explain, Explain, Explain: Uncertainty and Explanation Alignment for EEG Models Under Artifact and Explainer Perturbations
authors: Yaw Osei Adjei, Papa Adarkwa Agyapong, Kofi Boateng-Osei, et al.
note: Accepted May 2026. Perturbation-based XAI audit for EEG; abstain-to-explain under uncertainty.

title: But Are You Sure? Calibrating Uncertainty for Reliable Perturbation Explanations in Neural Biosignal Models
authors: Yaw Osei Adjei, Davis Opoku, Ephraim Abotsi, et al.
note: Submitted Feb 2026. Joint calibration and explanation quality under explainer-aligned perturbations on BCI IV 2a.

title: When the Brain Signal Lies: Uncertainty and Explanation Alignment for EEG-BCI Under Artifact Perturbations
authors: Yaw Osei Adjei, Davis Opoku, Ephraim Abotsi, et al.
note: Submitted Mar 2026; revised Apr 2026. Formalizes uncertainty and explanation alignment; abstain-to-explain on BCI Competition IV 2a and OpenBMI.

title: One Call, Two Outputs: Multilingual Voice-Based Injury Reporting and Surveillance in Ghana
authors: Yaw Osei Adjei, Davis Opoku, Kwadwo Amanqua Owusu, and Benjamin Tei Partey
venue: Injury Conference 2026 (KNUST and University of Washington), oral presentation
note: Abstract Apr 2026; Oral presentation 6–7 May 2026. VoiceTrace: five-stage NLP pipeline from spoken injury reports in Twi, Ga, Ewe, Fante, or Dagbani to spoken first-aid guidance plus structured geocoded surveillance over a basic phone call.

title: Semantic Superiority vs. Forensic Efficiency: A Comparative Analysis of Deep Learning and Psycholinguistics for Business Email Compromise Detection
note: Submitted Nov 2025; accepted Feb 2026 for SVCC 2026. Cost-sensitive comparison of DistilBERT vs. psycholinguistic CatBoost on hybrid BEC corpora.

title: Conformal PM2.5 Mapping Under Spatial Covariate Shift: Satellite and Reanalysis Fusion for Africa's Green Industrial Transition
authors: Yaw Osei Adjei, Davis Opoku, Ephraim Abotsi, et al.
note: Submitted Mar 2026; accepted for oral Apr 2026. Conformal spatial CV, regional reliability flags, and monitor prioritization across 29 African countries (OpenAQ 2017 to 2022). Preprint on arXiv.

title: A Right to an Explanation, or a Right to Be Misled? Auditing AI Explanation Reliability at Deployment
authors: Yaw Osei Adjei, Benjamin Tei Partey
note: Submitted May 2026. Deployment-focused accountability for explanation systems: misalignment rate and abstain-to-explain on EEG-based models under artefacts.

title: HELIX: A Multi-Method Framework for Heteroskedasticity Detection
authors: Philip Amponsah Baning, Yaw Osei Adjei
note: Classic BP, White, neural BP with bootstrap, and sliding-window Local BP in a unified Python framework.

title: VLM: Variance Landscape Mapping for Heteroskedastic Reward Signals in Reinforcement Learning
authors: Philip Amponsah Baning, Yaw Osei Adjei
note: Separates aleatoric vs. epistemic variance for exploration in heteroskedastic bandits and DQN-style settings.

title: Do Foundation Model Embeddings Improve Cross-Country Crop Yield Generalisation? A Leave-One-Country-Out Evaluation in Sub-Saharan Africa
note: LOCO evaluation on 6,404 smallholder maize fields (5 countries); Prithvi-EO vs. Sentinel-2 under distribution shift.

title: A Right to an Explanation, or a Right to Be Misled? Auditing AI Explanation Reliability at Deployment
authors: Yaw Osei Adjei, Benjamin Tei Partey
note: Deployment-focused accountability for explanation systems: misalignment rate and abstain-to-explain on EEG-based models under artefacts.
